lc_check.lc_verification_note: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-25D-360772' and order reference 'ESC_00068266' do not contain LC-related bank terms.

Invoice page 2: header 'SOIC Global Trading AB'
Invoice page 2: Account Holder 'SOIC Global Trading AB'

candidates.raw_text: Testliner 2 FSC (multiple lines with BW/RW specifications)

criteria_checked.detail: Certificate consignor 'SOIC Global Trading AB' matches invoice issuer 'SOIC Global Trading AB' exactly.
Certificate consignee 'Cartones de Guatemala S.A' matches invoice INVOICE TO and CONSIGNEE 'Cartones de Guatemala S.A.' (after normalization of trailing period).
Certificate order reference 'ESC_00068266' matches invoice ORDER REF. 'ESC_00068266'. Certificate order number '25349' matches invoice ORDER NO. '25349'.

pairing_validation.note: Document pairing validated successfully. All three criteria met.

checkpoints.certificate_value: SOIC Global Trading AB, C/O Greencarrier AB, Box 1076, 413 27 Göteborg, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: SOIC Global Trading AB, Forsta Langgatan 28B, Gothenburg 41327 Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice pages
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate consignor 'SOIC Global Trading AB' found exactly in invoice header (page 1 and page 2), issuer address block, and bank account holder (page 2). Direct match — no need to proceed to 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6.
Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice issuer address: 'Gothenburg 41327 Sweden'. Exact match. Additionally confirmed by VAT ID prefix 'SE' (SE559328674201) and IBAN prefix 'SE24' per rule 4.1.2.1.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure – consignor name found expressly in invoice header and address block
Country verification via indirect identifiers – VAT prefix SE and IBAN prefix SE confirm Sweden

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'SOIC Global Trading AB' in Sweden. Invoice is issued by 'SOIC Global Trading AB' at Forsta Langgatan 28B, Gothenburg 41327 Sweden, with VAT ID SE559328674201. Company name is an exact match. Country is Sweden in both documents. The address differs (certificate: Box 1076 c/o Greencarrier AB; invoice: Forsta Langgatan 28B) but per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not cause MISMATCH — only company name and country matter.
checkpoints.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'SOIC Global Trading AB' i certifikatet återfinns exakt i fakturans utställarblock och sidhuvud. Land Sverige bekräftas via explicit adress samt VAT-prefix SE. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Cartones de Guatemala S.A, 2da Calle 24-00, Zona 15, Vista Hermosa II Edificio Domani Sexto Nivel Oficina 601, Guatemala 1015, NIT 592482-0, Guatemala
checkpoints.invoice_value: Cartones de Guatemala S.A., 2da Calle 24-00, Zona 15, Vista Hermosa II Edificio Domani Sexto Nivel Oficina 601, Guatemala 1015, Guatemala, NIT 592482-0

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice contains 'INVOICE TO' field with 'Cartones de Guatemala S.A.' and also 'CONSIGNEE' field with same party. Both primary and secondary fields point to the same entity.

Certificate: 'Cartones de Guatemala S.A' (no trailing period). Invoice: 'Cartones de Guatemala S.A.' (with trailing period). After normalization of punctuation, these are identical. Same legal entity.
Certificate: 'Guatemala'. Invoice INVOICE TO: 'Guatemala'. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Priority identification – INVOICE TO field is primary billing field
Name verification – names match after punctuation normalization
MATCH – company name identified and country matches

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Cartones de Guatemala S.A' in Guatemala. Invoice has both INVOICE TO and CONSIGNEE fields listing 'Cartones de Guatemala S.A.' in Guatemala with same address and NIT 592482-0. The only difference is a trailing period ('S.A' vs 'S.A.') which is punctuation normalization. Address and NIT number also match exactly. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Mottagaren 'Cartones de Guatemala S.A' i certifikatet identifieras exakt i fakturans INVOICE TO-fält och CONSIGNEE-fält som 'Cartones de Guatemala S.A.' (skillnaden är enbart en punkt efter 'A'). Land Guatemala stämmer. NIT 592482-0 stämmer. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value:
SO 25349 ESC_00068266
Testliner 2 FSC
NET WEIGHT: 189.048 MT
checkpoints.invoice_value: Testliner 2 FSC (multiple rows with BW/RW specifications), ORDER NO. 25349, ORDER REF. ESC_00068266

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate does not contain specific article numbers (item/part numbers). The references 'SO 25349' and 'ESC_00068266' are order number and order reference respectively, not article numbers. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in the certificate and match against invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate's identity-bearing main designation: 'Testliner 2 FSC'. Invoice contains 'Testliner 2 FSC' in every product row (9 rows). Exact text match after normalization. The additional specifications in the invoice (BW, RW, gsm values) are non-identity-bearing additions per rule 4.3.4.
Certificate: 'SO 25349 ESC_00068266'. Invoice: ORDER NO. 25349, ORDER REF. ESC_00068266. Both references match exactly.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation 'Testliner 2 FSC' found exactly in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions – BW/RW/gsm specifications in invoice do not affect product identity

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate describes goods as 'Testliner 2 FSC' with order references SO 25349 and ESC_00068266. Invoice contains 9 rows all described as 'Testliner 2 FSC' with various BW (basis weight) and RW (roll width) specifications. The identity-bearing main designation 'Testliner 2 FSC' is an exact match. The BW/RW specifications are non-identity-bearing additions per 4.3.4. Order number 25349 and order reference ESC_00068266 both match exactly between certificate and invoice.
checkpoints.motivation: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'Testliner 2 FSC' i certifikatet återfinns exakt i fakturans samtliga artikelrader. Orderreferenser (SO 25349, ESC_00068266) stämmer överens. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate quantity can be identified in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate box 7: '189.048 MT'. Invoice total row: '189.048 MT 66 ROLLS'. The numeric value 189.048 with unit MT is exactly present in the invoice total row. Direct identification — no calculation needed.

comparison_steps.description: Verify numeric value and unit are both present
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 189.048 MT — both numeric value (189.048) and unit (MT) are explicit. Invoice total: 189.048 MT — same numeric value and unit.

comparison_steps.description: Confirm box 7 value is the verification basis
comparison_steps.detail: Box 7 contains '189.048 MT'. Box 6 also contains 'NET WEIGHT: 189.048 MT'. Both are consistent. Box 7 is the verification basis per rule 4.4.2.1.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check – numeric value 189.048 MT found directly in invoice total row
Quantity with unit – both numeric value and unit MT explicitly stated
Box 7 value used as verification basis

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '189.048 MT'. The invoice total row states '189.048 MT 66 ROLLS'. The numeric value 189.048 and unit MT are an exact match. No calculation or normalization needed. Certificate box 6 also states 'NET WEIGHT: 189.048 MT' which is consistent. The invoice does not label this as GW or NW in the total row, but the certificate box 6 labels it as NET WEIGHT. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: certificate states one weight value without GW/NW category in box 7, and with NET WEIGHT label in box 6. The numeric value 189.048 MT matches exactly in the invoice. The invoice does not contain a contradictory alternative weight of another category. MATCH per 4.4.2.2 point 2.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet 189.048 MT (ruta 7) återfinns exakt i fakturans totalrad som '189.048 MT'. Direkt identifiering utan beräkning. MATCH.

comparison_steps.detail: Invoice NOTES section: 'Country of origin: Germany'. This is an explicit origin field.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate's 'EU' origin can be verified against invoice's 'Germany'
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate states 'EU' in box 3. Invoice states 'Country of origin: Germany'. Germany (DE) is an EU member state (EU-27). Per rule 4.5.4.2: if certificate states 'EU' and invoice states a specific EU member state → verified.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 – Check for non-EU origins in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Verify no non-EU origins exist in invoice that contradict certificate
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice only states one origin: Germany. Germany is EU member. No non-EU origins found in invoice.

rules_applied.description: EU normalization – EU is verified when invoice contains an EU member state origin
EU member state interchange – certificate 'EU' verified against invoice 'Germany' (DE is EU-27 member)

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'EU' as country of origin. Invoice NOTES section states 'Country of origin: Germany'. Germany is an EU member state. Per rule 4.5.4.2, when the certificate states 'EU' and the invoice states a specific EU member state, this is verified. The certificate issue date is 2025-09-25, and Germany is an EU-27 member at that date. No non-EU origins are found in the invoice. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsland 'EU'. Fakturan anger 'Country of origin: Germany'. Tyskland är EU-medlemsstat. Enligt EU-normaliseringsregeln är detta verifierat. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate.
Document A is certificate (Certificate of Origin). Document B is invoice (2-page commercial invoice). Standard pairing: certificate from file 1, invoice from file 2.
All three criteria met: consignor match, consignee match, order reference match.
Consignor 'SOIC Global Trading AB' found in invoice header, issuer block, and bank account holder.
INVOICE TO field identified as primary billing field. Consignee matches.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.detail: 'Testliner 2 FSC' found exactly in all invoice product rows.
BW/RW/gsm specifications treated as non-identity-bearing additions.
189.048 MT found exactly in invoice total row.
Certificate 'EU' verified against invoice 'Germany' (EU member state).
Certificate 'EU', invoice 'Germany'. Germany is EU-27 member. Verified.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The difference in consignor address (Box 1076 c/o Greencarrier AB vs Forsta Langgatan 28B) could indicate different entities
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.1.5, differences in street address or postal address do not in themselves cause MISMATCH. The company name 'SOIC Global Trading AB' and country 'Sweden' match exactly. Address differences are irrelevant for consignor verification.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The certificate states 'EU' but the invoice states 'Germany' — these could be different origins
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.5.4.2, 'EU' in certificate and a specific EU member state in invoice are interchangeable. Germany is an EU-27 member state. This is an expressly permitted normalization.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The certificate does not contain an invoice number, so document pairing may be uncertain
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The certificate contains order number SO 25349 and order reference ESC_00068266, both of which match the invoice exactly (ORDER NO. 25349, ORDER REF. ESC_00068266). Pairing validation passed all three criteria (consignor, consignee, order reference). No invoice number is required when other references establish a clear link.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändare (SOIC Global Trading AB, Sverige), mottagare (Cartones de Guatemala S.A., Guatemala), varubeskrivning (Testliner 2 FSC), kvantitet (189.048 MT) och ursprungsland (EU/Tyskland) kan alla verifieras. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
decision_factors: Consignor: exact name match 'SOIC Global Trading AB' with country Sweden confirmed via address and VAT prefix
Consignee: exact name match 'Cartones de Guatemala S.A.' in INVOICE TO field with country Guatemala
Goods: 'Testliner 2 FSC' exact text match across all invoice rows, order references match
Quantity: 189.048 MT exact match in invoice total row
Origin: Certificate 'EU' verified via invoice 'Germany' (EU member state per rule 4.5.4.2)

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints MATCH. Overall confidence 0.97. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW items. Consistency verified: all motivations align with their respective status values.
